extracted_claim: The customer claims the cardboard box corner is crushed.
evidence_standard_met_reason: The images show the exterior of the package, allowing for an assessment of the claimed damage.
claim_status_justification: Image 2 shows the cardboard box from multiple angles, and the corners are intact and not crushed. Image 1 shows a completely different type of packaging (a padded mailer) which is not the cardboard box claimed by the user.
